questionHtml:
Which statement is correct about the ions in a cell assembled from these half-cells?

Reaction E⦵
Ni2+ (aq) + 2e− ⇌ Ni (s) −0.26 V
Zn2+ (aq) + 2e− ⇌ Zn (s) −0.76 V


A.  Negative ions flow into the zinc half-cell from the salt bridge.

B.  Negative ions flow into the nickel half-cell from the salt bridge.

C.  Zn2+ ions are reduced to Zn.

D.  The concentration of Ni2+ ions increases.

meta.title: Which statement is correct about the ions in a cell assembled from these half-cells? Reaction E⦵ Ni2+ (aq) + 2e− ⇌ Ni (s) −0.26 V Zn2+ (aq) + 2e− ⇌ Zn (s) −0.76 V A. Negative ions
